reviews.review_title: Very promising future for this game!
reviews.review_description: The interface is clean. I like the fact that you can play without controllers. Great for focus and stretching of the arm. This is maybe in it's early stage but is very promising. I wish they will add music or sound effects. Bring levels where 2 lights open at the same time so we can utilize both hands moving together. I can foresee a great potential in the future improvement of this game.

Refit XR is an excellent reaction light training system
 like those used in boxing gyms that makes exercising genuinely enjoyable. The workouts are well-paced, and easy to jump into, whether you’re a beginner or already fairly active. 

The visuals are clean and functional, and the tracking is generally solid, helping movements feel natural and responsive.

That said, there’s still room for improvement. A bit more variety in environments and music would help keep long-term sessions feeling fresh and the ability to move and scale up or down the grid would be a massive improvement.

Overall, Refit XR is a good VR fitness title that successfully blends fun and exercise. At the set price point it makes it worthy of 4 stars and I look forward to to the dev updating this when he can.

developer_response.body: Hi, Thanks a lot for your comments. Yes we will add even more games to exercise different ways.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game for players wishing to improve eye and hand coordination,  I’m not sure this is a true fitness game, but is good for improving reflexes,  I found as I played the game more my reflexes did improve. It’s good that you can increase the workout times.  I am sure the Devs will be adding  new features soon.

developer_response.body: Hi, Thanks for your comment, yes we are planning 2 more exercises to add and making the app overall more enjoyable

reviews.review_title: 🎯 Fast, Addictive Reflex Training in MR
reviews.review_description:
Refit XR is a sharp and engaging mixed reality reflex game where speed and precision are everything. You’re faced with 12 lights, and your goal is to hit as many moving targets as possible within a time limit you choose (starting from 30 seconds). Simple to understand, but surprisingly challenging to master.

Thanks to mixed reality, it genuinely feels like playing a real arcade reaction game in your own space. It’s excellent for improving hand-eye coordination and staying mentally sharp, while also getting you moving.

Perfect for quick sessions, Refit XR shines when chasing high scores—either trying to beat your own record or competing with friends. Easy to jump into, instantly fun, and highly replayable.

developer_response.body:
Hello, We really appreciate it, and we are so glad you enjoyed it. 

Next update will be a big upgrade visually for gameplay.  Really soon

reviews.review_description: A neat game where you hit the lights. The nice thing is being able to adjust the size of the board where the lights sit.  Perfect distance to hit the target.  Other games like this that I have played, the targets were so far apart that the head movement looking for them made me dizzy.  This keeps everything neat, clean, and in front of you.  Great time killer.  Both AR or VR.  I would love to see some different VR environments to be in, and maybe some different layouts of the lights. I like boxing games, so this trainer is something I was looking for to add to my speed and reaction times.

reviews.review_title: One of the Best VR Reflex Trainers
reviews.review_description:
Highly recommended. This game is excellent for training reflexes, reaction time, and focus. The gameplay is simple, fast, and extremely effective after a few sessions, you genuinely feel sharper and quicker. It’s fun, intense, and a great VR workout.

The only downside is the lack of levels. The core gameplay is so good that it really deserves much more content. I hope the developer adds more levels because I’d love to keep playing this for a long time :)

developer_response.body: aRDD, Thanks a lot, we are always improving it, and for sure step by step we are adding new gameplays, different platforms to train/play.
